templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.shopmixology.com/collections/sale

templates.name: Are your promos online only?
templates.content: All promotions are always both in store and online.

templates.name: Are you hiring?
templates.content: The best way to get info on that is to email rspellman@shopmixology.com with your application. She is our retail manager and will be glad to look into that for you.

templates.name: Can I use a credit in store and online?
templates.content: Absolutely! You can use a credit in store or online.

templates.name: Can I order online and pick up at the store?
templates.content: Unfortunately, you won't be able to pick up your order from the store. Once the order is placed online, it'll ship from our fulfillment center.

templates.name: How to use credits
templates.content:
Do you have an online or in-store credit? 

If you have a store credit and want to use it online, we'd have to do a transfer in our back end system. Can I have your email address please?

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customerservice@shopmixology.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Are the items you have on sale considered Final Sale? / Which of your items are Final Sale?
templates.content: All sale merchandise, gift cards, and masks are final sale and are non-refundable.

templates.name: Can I return an order I made online in one of your stores?
templates.content: Absolutely! Online returns can be returned in-store, though be advised that it's for store credit only.

templates.name: Social Media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/shopmixology/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/MixologyClothingCompany

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at (516) 341-7454 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@shopmixology.com or give us a call at (516) 341-7454. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.shopmixology.com/pages/mixology-stores

templates.name: Ambassador Program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can apply for our ambassador program here: https://www.shopmixology.com/pages/ambassadors

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: We ship all orders from Lynbrook, New York.

templates.name: Can online discount codes be used in store?
templates.content: We do allow online coupons to be used in-store, but it's up to the discretion of the store location. We recommend using your code online.

templates.name: Can I return at a store?
templates.content: You can return online or in any of our store locations. If you return online you can receive a full refund or credit. If you return in store you will receive store credit only.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.shopmixology.com/collections/sale-view-all

templates.name: Rewards program
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.shopmixology.com/#smile-home

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Please allow 1-2 business days for processing before your items ship out. We usually ship via USPS and once shipped, it takes 5-7 business days domestically and 10 business days internationally.

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://www.shopmixology.com/pages/faqs#returns-exchanges and here's a link to our Returns Center where you can start the process: https://shopmixology.loopreturns.com/#/

templates.name: Free Shipping
templates.content: We offer free standard shipping for domestic orders over $150! Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to move forward is to give us a call at (516) 341-7454. Since this is time-sensitive, our team will be happy to assist you right away!
